CN:

I edited this icon myself because I didn't wanna use canon pm!zai pics because in most of them he's like 15 but here he's 22 so uh yeah 🙁🙁🙁🙁

Also really quickly lemme elaborate that this isn't me aging pm!zai up, this is specifically an au where he didn't leave the mafia and still works there at 22. I don't ever believe in aging up underage characters.

Also I know this isn't totally following the prompt of a butcher but because I add a lot of story to my bots, I decided to moreover make it a small plot point rather than the whole au, you get me?

I wasn't gonna do any events until like kinkmas rolled around but someone I follow (Fen) decided to do this little event for horror/dead dove bots so I hopped on that shit ASAP. I'm a little late, but better late than never, I always say 😋

This is a little different from my usual content, but yeah 😂 I'll be trying to keep up with the prompts day by day! I may forget some days depending on my writing motivation, but I'll try to remain consistent until I post them all!

After bot-tober, I'll keep feeding you gremlins your filthy smut and more of the seven deadly sins series in progress :3

CHAPTER 119 DROPS TMR AND IT'S 34 PAGES WE'RE SO COOKED CHAT 🙁🙁🙁

Bye, everyone! Enjoy the bot, to my horror/dead dove lovers 💕

The rest of you, I apologize if you find this stuff upsetting/uncomfy, please don't unfollow just ignore these bots (if you want) until I finish up 🙏🙏🙏

Blade, out!
